news-global-econ.title: Tesla Robotaxi Miami launch comes with limits
news-global-econ.description: Tesla Robotaxi launches in Miami with a limited geofence covering only West Miami, Doral and Sweetwater, leaving out most major destinations.

news-global-econ.description:
The crackdown on illegal immigration by the Trump administration now extends to bank lending that drove up home prices and put ownership out of reach for many Americans.

news-global-econ.title: New York business group campaigns to end 'Prohibition-era' alcohol restrictions statewide
news-global-econ.description: The "Cheers for Change" campaign launched Sunday, targeting New York's Prohibition-era alcohol beverage control laws that restrict liquor license approvals.

news-global-econ.title: Ukrainian prime minister resigns in Zelenskyy shake-up
news-global-econ.description: Yulia Svyrydenko resigned as Ukraine's prime minister, with Zelenskyy saying he offered her a new role in relations with a key international partner.

news-global-econ.title: Senate returns to packed agenda after Graham's death shrinks GOP margin
news-global-econ.description: The SAVE America Act, FISA reauthorization, renewed Iran strikes, and government funding all await the Senate as it returns for a July sprint.

news-korea-soc.title: Trump has 3 choices to define victory if he wants to beat Iran. None of them are easy
news-korea-soc.description: Retaliation is not strategy. As CENTCOM strikes Iranian targets near the Strait of Hormuz, the nuclear question and oil prices remain unresolved.

news-thai-soc.title: Exposed docs reveal why Tim Walz board awarded repeat child rapist pardon: ‘No future’
news-thai-soc.description: Marco Rubio terminated the legal status of a convicted child rapist who received a full pardon from Tim Walz's board over deportation concerns.

news-global-soc.description:
One person is dead and details are scant following a Monday morning shooting that involved U.S. Immigration and Customs Agents (ICE) in Biddeford, Maine. The Portland Press Herald reported the incident occurred “at the corner of Pool and Hill streets.”

news-global-soc.description:

news-global-soc.title: Forget politics. This is what I found helping Venezuelan quake victims
news-global-soc.description: The leader of Operation Blessing expected suspicion in Venezuela during earthquake relief but instead found resilient communities and deep warmth.

Missile and drone strikes hit a host of Gulf states near the Strait of Hormuz early Monday morning as Iran again claimed sole and enduring of the essential waterway. Oman, Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait were amongst those to be targeted by Tehran.
